description: Phase 17C retrieval-strategy benchmark: 36 queries authored against the live ingested corpus (8,017 GitHub/Jira incidents across kubernetes, terraform, langchain, istio, redis, helm, ray, sentry, go, cockroach, kafka, spark) to compare Dense, BM25, and Hybrid (RRF) retrieval.
author: phase-17c

queries.query: Ephemeral resources renewal diagnostics silently dropped due to discarded Append return
MemoryQoS does not set memory.high for BestEffort pods on cgroup v2
Opt-in UltraLogLog encoding for HyperLogLog less memory same accuracy
Gateway API BackendTLSPolicy cross-namespace ConfigMap CAs intermittently fail SDS sync
kube-apiserver upgrade from v1.32 to v1.33 can deadlock due to admission webhooks and ServiceCIDR
HuggingFaceBgeEmbeddings was marked as deprecated without proper replacement
s3 backend not using sso session when profile is used
ZookeeperConsumerConnectorMBean needs to close SimpleConsumer when done
CoreDNS restart loop FailedCreatePodSandBox due to flannel subnet.env race condition
Add cluster resharding with minimal downtime and online migration
Helm plugin update fails
Ray Dashboard per process GRAM usage measures utilization and not allocated memory
Terraform isn't picking up the AWS SSO-based session when a named profile is specified for the S3 state backend
On cgroup v2, best-effort workloads don't get their upper memory bound configured by the QoS memory feature
A cardinality-estimator data structure gained an encoding mode that trades a bit of accuracy for roughly a third less memory, opt-in only
A cross-cluster TLS policy backed by config maps in other namespaces occasionally fails to sync its certificate discovery data on the gateway
Bumping the Kubernetes API server across two minor releases can hang the cluster because of how admission hooks interact with a feature that ships on by default
An embeddings wrapper for a BGE-style HuggingFace model lost support without anyone being given an alternative to switch to
DNS pods keep getting killed and restarted because of a timing problem with how the network overlay writes its subnet configuration file
Resharding a distributed in-memory cache cluster online without taking it offline or causing major downtime
Updating an installed third-party CLI extension command doesn't complete successfully
The GPU memory figure shown on the cluster monitoring dashboard reflects what's actively in use rather than what was reserved
Istio BackendTLSPolicy interactions: cross-namespace SDS sync failures and conflicts when a DestinationRule also exists
Helm plugin lifecycle problems: the update command failing, and the plugin version environment variable not being passed to install/update/delete scripts
Kubernetes memory management issues: MemoryQoS not setting memory.high for BestEffort pods, and high memory usage in kube-controller-manager from caching full objects
Ray Data reliability problems: actor task retries hitting the same broken actor causing an infinite hang, and pipeline deadlocks when streaming generator tasks vanish
Kubernetes apiserver and admission timing issues: startup timeout set too low, and an upgrade-induced deadlock from admission webhooks with new default-enabled APIs
Sentry GitHub/GitLab source integration issues: a GitLab integration problem, and supporting relative path resolution in stack trace sources via the GitHub integration
credit card payment processing failure in the checkout flow
oven temperature calibration is inaccurate on the smart kitchen appliance
employee payroll tax withholding calculation is wrong for the new fiscal year
hotel room booking confirmation email never arrives after reservation
airline flight seat upgrade loyalty points not credited to account
veterinary appointment scheduling app crashes when adding a new pet
grocery delivery driver app shows wrong estimated arrival time
high school exam grading rubric inconsistent between teachers
